headline: Apollo Global Management (APO) Acquiring Nippon Sheet Amid Soaring Architectural Glass Demand
summary: Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE:APO) is one of the most undervalued growth stocks to buy, according to analysts. On March 24, Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO) entered into an agreement to acquire Nippon Sheet Glass for about $3.7 billion in enterprise value. It becomes the asset manager’s fifth private equity investment in Japan. The transaction is […]
